description_long: This is a three-tiered cake with a rich, chocolate-brown exterior and a textured, golden-brown band encircling the base of each tier. The cake is topped with a single, twisted candle that has an orange and white striped pattern. The chocolate coating appears glossy and smooth, with a slightly wavy edge where it meets the golden bands, suggesting a ganache or thick glaze. The tiers are evenly stacked, each one slightly smaller than the one below, creating a classic, celebratory appearance. There are no additional decorations or embellishments, giving the cake a clean and minimalist look. The cake is not displayed on any visible plate or stand, and the base rests directly on the surface.
description: A three-tiered chocolate cake with golden-brown bands and a single striped candle on top, featuring a glossy finish and minimalist style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three stacked tiers, glossy chocolate coating, golden bands, and the single striped candle clearly centered.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the wavy chocolate edge and the texture of the golden bands, with the candle still visible at the top.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the even stacking of the tiers and the consistent chocolate and golden band pattern, with the candle centered.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the smooth, rounded shape of the tiers and the uniformity of the chocolate and golden bands.
